task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'. Return the region code.
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/RoleName'.
